title: 3AM Rain
description: The first track composed with real audio samples — jazz drum kit, plucked strings, breathy sax, outdoor ambience. Arranged in five sections (intro → verse → bridge → verse → outro) with 12 layers fading in and out. Rendered headless via Strudel + Dirt-Samples on a $0 VM.
technique: Strudel pattern composition + headless offline rendering with Dirt-Samples
